implement_now.name: Missed Opportunity Ledger
implement_now.validation_method: Unit tests for ledger CRUD and aggregation. Integration test tracking rejected and ignored opportunities.

implement_now.name: Opportunity Uniqueness Score
implement_now.validation_method: Unit tests on scoring logic. Historical analysis verifying scores are meaningful.

implement_now.name: Auto-Approval Readiness Score
implement_now.validation_method: Simulate scores on historical decisions. Verify high-scoring decisions had better outcomes.

implement_now.name: Opportunity Cost Report
implement_now.validation_method: Generate reports on historical data. Verify opportunity cost calculations are correct.

implement_now.name: Signal-to-Decision Audit
implement_now.validation_method: Unit tests linking signals, hypotheses, and decisions. Integration test for complete trace.

implement_now.name: Notification Quality Gate
implement_now.validation_method: Unit tests on notification priority logic. Manual verification of suppression and batching.

implement_now.name: Terminal Cockpit Evolution
implement_now.validation_method: Manual testing. Verify new CLI commands produce correct output.

strategic_backlog.name: Decision DNA
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Compare decisions of same DNA type. Verify outcomes improve over time.

strategic_backlog.name: Criterion Timeline
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Trend analysis on Criterion metrics over 3, 6, 12-month windows.

strategic_backlog.name: Confidence Calibration
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Calibration curves per decision type. Brier score tracking. Improvement over time.

strategic_backlog.name: Resource Allocation Engine
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Compare resource efficiency before and after allocation engine.

strategic_backlog.name: Counterfactual Simulator
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Retrospective tests — simulate alternatives and compare to actual outcomes.

strategic_backlog.name: Decision Replay
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Compare original decision quality scores with replay scores.

strategic_backlog.name: Cognitive Bias Detector
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Compare flagged decisions with actual outcomes. Verify bias flags correlate with decision errors.

strategic_backlog.name: Unknown Detector
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Verify high-uncertainty decisions have more variable outcomes.

strategic_backlog.name: Research Agent
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Compare Research Agent hypotheses with human-generated hypotheses. Measure hit rate.

strategic_backlog.name: Knowledge Decay
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Verify decayed knowledge is less predictive than fresh knowledge.

strategic_backlog.name: Decision Market
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Compare market-selected hypotheses against council-selected ones.

strategic_backlog.name: World Memory
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Compare world model predictions with actual outcomes.

strategic_backlog.name: Black Swan Archive
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Track black swan frequency over time. Verify fewer events become black swans.

strategic_backlog.name: Human Override Learning
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Track override frequency and override outcome. Verify system learns to reduce overrides.

strategic_backlog.name: Scarce Resources Dashboard
strategic_backlog.validation_method: Verify dashboard trends correlate with user-reported well-being.

research_lab.name: Can Criterion be measured directly or only inferred from better decisions?
research_lab.validation_method: Compare direct Criterion scores with outcome-based inference. If they agree, either is valid.

research_lab.name: Can Criterion decay?
dependencies: 12+ months data spanning two market regimes
research_lab.validation_method: Compare decision quality during stable regimes vs regime transitions.

research_lab.name: Can false evidence create false Criterion?
research_lab.validation_method: Inject known-false evidence into hypotheses. Track whether system detects and corrects the error.

research_lab.name: How much memory is enough?
dependencies: 12+ months of telemetry and operational data
research_lab.validation_method: Test whether pruning old operational data changes Criterion analysis quality.

research_lab.name: When should knowledge expire?
dependencies: 6+ months knowledge records with outcome data
research_lab.validation_method: Assign decay rates based on market volatility at validation time. Compare error rates.

research_lab.name: Can the system detect when it does not know enough?
dependencies: 100+ decisions with confidence records and known outcomes
research_lab.validation_method: Compare ignorance estimates with actual outcome variance.

research_lab.name: Can decision quality improve even when short-term PnL is negative?
dependencies: 6+ months decision quality scores and PnL data
research_lab.validation_method: Identify periods where decision quality improved but PnL was flat or negative.

research_lab.name: Can trading Criterion transfer to creator/business domains?
research_lab.validation_method: Design a non-trading hypothesis test. Compare Criterion development across domains.

research_lab.name: How should opportunity cost be estimated for missed trades?
research_lab.validation_method: Compare estimated opportunity cost with actual outcomes of similar trades.

research_lab.name: How can the system compare a taken decision with an untaken alternative?
research_lab.validation_method: Start with simple baselines. Compare against more sophisticated methods as data accumulates.

research_lab.name: What is the minimum evidence threshold for autonomous execution?
research_lab.validation_method: Simulate thresholds on historical decisions. Find threshold that would approve only positive-outcome decisions.

research_lab.name: Can scarce resources be modeled as capital classes?
research_lab.validation_method: Model capital, time, attention as capital classes. Track returns over 6 months.

research_lab.name: How does the system avoid overfitting to recent market regimes?
dependencies: 12+ months data spanning at least two market regimes
research_lab.validation_method: Compare system performance during and after regime changes. Measure adaptation speed.

research_lab.name: What makes a hypothesis worth creating?
research_lab.validation_method: Track which hypothesis attributes correlate with eventual validation.

research_lab.name: What makes a hypothesis worth killing?
research_lab.validation_method: Set auto-archive time limit. Measure whether archived hypotheses would have become relevant later.

research_lab.name: How can the Innovation Engine improve its own innovation process?
research_lab.validation_method: Track Innovation Engine metrics. Review quarterly. Adjust process based on evidence.

graveyard.name: Build every interesting agent immediately
graveyard.rejection_reason: Complexity exceeds one-person constraint. More static agents do not improve learning.
graveyard.reconsideration_condition: When agents can learn from outcomes (not static rules), adding more becomes valuable.

graveyard.name: Turn O.M.A.-C.O.R.E. into a generic chatbot
graveyard.rejection_reason: Misalignment with anti-goals. The system explains, it does not converse.
graveyard.reconsideration_condition: When the system has demonstrable Criterion across multiple domains and CLI is insufficient.

graveyard.name: Optimize dashboard aesthetics before decision quality
graveyard.rejection_reason: Premature. Development time better spent on decision quality than visual polish.
graveyard.reconsideration_condition: When the system demonstrates consistent decision quality improvement over 6+ months.

graveyard.name: Automate live execution before evidence-based approval
graveyard.rejection_reason: Directly violates Architecture Invariants 3 and 6. No approval engine exists.
graveyard.reconsideration_condition: Decision Approval Engine exists, has processed 100+ decisions with known outcomes, and readiness score exceeds threshold. This rejection is absolute until the condition is met.

graveyard.name: Add markets before improving decision quality
graveyard.rejection_reason: Complexity multiplier without addressing core bottleneck (decision quality). Current market set is sufficient.
graveyard.reconsideration_condition: When the system demonstrates sustained decision quality improvement across all current markets for 6+ months.

graveyard.name: Treat Criterion as a single score
graveyard.rejection_reason: Philosophical contradiction with Invariant 1. Single score would be gamed (Goodhart's Law).
graveyard.reconsideration_condition: If evidence after 12+ months of multi-dimensional Criterion tracking shows a single composite score is equally informative.

graveyard.name: Treat profit as the only success metric
graveyard.rejection_reason: Directly contradicts the project's core thesis and Manifesto. Profit-only evaluation would abandon the project's mission.
